tools.name: search_rounds
tools.description: Search European tech funding rounds (cited, EUR-normalized at the ECB rate on the round date). Returns newest first with a `nextCursor` for pagination.

tools.name: find_companies
tools.description: Find companies by name (case-insensitive substring). Returns id, location and verified funding totals; pass the id to get_company for the full profile.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Full company profile: description, location, sectors, every funding round with stage/amount/investors, named backers, exit if any. Figures are source-linked on the company page URL.

tools.name: search_investors
tools.description: Search investors (entity-resolved: name variants are merged). Sortable by deal count or company count.

tools.name: get_investor
tools.description: Investor profile: deal count, companies backed, stage mix, portfolio and recent deals.

tools.name: search_exits
tools.description: European tech exits and M&A (acquisitions, IPOs), newest first with a nextCursor. Filter by date window and by the exited company's country (use it for "European exits"). Most deal values are undisclosed — valueEur is null in ~65% of exits.

tools.name: market_map
tools.description: Aggregate the European funding picture for a period in ONE call: totals (disclosed €, rounds, companies, investors, exits), concentration, and breakdowns by country, sector and stage — with provenance (disclosed %, high-confidence %, ECB reconciliation Δ). Beats paging every round to sum client-side
